feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MDI adapter in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

How do I use a MDI adapter in CPI to query the company codes in MDI? I am trying something as below, the request is successful but the output isn't a list of company codes.


API response

If not this approach, how else can we check if data is available in MDI?

Regards,
Indu

entry.title: Unable to Post Payload to SOAP API using SAP CPI !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on integrating Zoho People (Third-Party HRMS) with SAP Public Cloud to create workforce/employee records. I am using SAP CPI to send data to SAP’s SOAP API. However, I am encountering an error, and I need guidance on resolving it.

Scenario Overview

  1. API Selection & Testing:

    • I found the required SOAP API on api.sap.com for replicating workforce data from a third-party HRMS.
    • Using SAP Documentation, I created the SOAP payload and tested it successfully in SOAP UI—it works fine.

  2. Issue When Using SAP CPI:

    • The same SOAP request fails when sent via SAP CPI.
    • Error from SAP SOAP API Log: Message "Envelope{http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/}" not supported (interface: "WORKFORCEPERSONMASTERDATAREPLI" binding

      CPI Integration Flow (iFlow) Design
  • Sender Adapter: HTTPS
  • Processing Steps:
    1. Content Modifier – Preparing Headers
    2. JSON to XML Converter – Converting JSON to XML
    3. Content Modifier – Adding SOAP envelope, binding values using XPath
    4. Request-Reply – Calling SOAP API
    5. Receiver Adapter: SOAP


       

Observations:

  • I simulated the iFlow and checked the payload before the request-reply step → It matches exactly with the payload tested in SOAP UI.
  • However, the same payload does not work when passed via SAP CPI.
  • When copied from CPI and tested in SOAP UI manually, it works.

Questions:

  1. What could be causing the "Envelope not supported" error when sending the request via SAP CPI?
  2. Are there any specific headers or content-type settings that SAP SOAP APIs expect from CPI?
  3. Could this issue be related to SOAP envelope namespaces? If so, how can I correct them in CPI?
  4. Are there any specific configurations needed in the SOAP receiver adapter for SAP Public Cloud APIs?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Missing Infotype IT0709 and IT9901 for Some Employees During SF to SAP HCM Replication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert ,

We are experiencing an issue where IT0709 (External Data) and IT9901 (Organizational Assignment) are not created in SAP HCM when certain employee records are replicated from SuccessFactors Employee Central via CPI. This issue does not affect all employees but only a few cases. As a result, these employees have incomplete records, leading to downstream issues in payroll, reporting, and organizational assignments.

What is the best practice for error handling in CPI to prevent incomplete data transfer? Should we implement an Exception Subprocess to retry failed records?

We are using the predefined iFlow:
"Replicate Employee Master Data and Organizational Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA."

Are there any SAP Notes or best practices specifically for handling missing infotypes due to failed SuccessFactors-to-SAP HCM replication?

Thank you

BR

entry.title: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help.

I have configured IAS as a proxy, and in IAS, I have set the Subject Name Identifier=employee_id

In Azure (OpenID Connection to IAS), I have added the employee_id to Additional Claims.

In the source system (Azure) in IPS, I have configured the transformation as follows:

{
"sourcePath": "$.employeeId",
"targetPath": "$.userName",
"correlationAttribute": true
}

Also in IPS transformation I replaced "sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName" with "sourcePath": "$.employeeId".

Users are provisioned with IPS.

In IAS, the "Login Name" field for users receives the employee_id, for example, 1111. These users are then provisioned to SAC and have the employee_id (1111) in the "USER ID" field as well.

When I try to test SSO and select "Choose a user attribute to map to your Identity Provider" -> User attribute set = "USER ID", the user is not found in SAC.

The user accesses the SAC link and enters their email address. The user is authenticated in Azure, but in SAC, the user is not found.

I need help.

I can't solve this by myself.

Thank you very much !!!

entry.title: Need Help with Error 32 - Broken Pipe, HTTP Adapter - Avoid Sending Response in Certain Cases
entry.content:
Hi Tech Community,

I’m facing the following issue:

A sender using HTTP (which, as we know, is synchronous) sends a payload and expects a response. If the flow crashes, there is no business impact since the sender has a retry mechanism.

The sender side closes the connection after 30 seconds due to business requirements. However, we cannot catch this error because it is not raised during the flow execution but rather occurs outside of it (if I understand correctly how servlets are built). As a result, while the business is not impacted, CPI monitoring detects failures and requires constant checks.

This results in Error 32 - Broken Pipe, as the connection is already closed when the response is attempted to be sent back.

I attempted to implement logic that terminates the flow after 30+ seconds, but the Termination End still sends a response to the sender, causing a failure due to the closed connection.

Does anyone have insights on this issue or ideas on how to prevent sending a response with the HTTP adapter in certain cases?

Looking forward to your responses.

Best regards,
Andrejs

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping Issue: Handling Empty & Null CountryCode with Conditional Mapping
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing an issue with SAP CPI Message Mapping, where I need to control the creation of a Address field based on the CountryCode. The problem arises when CountryCode is null or empty, causing the mapping to fail.

I have tried various Mapping approaches, including ifWithoutElse(), equals(), exists(), and not(), but I still cannot get the desired output in all cases. I am reaching out to see if anyone has encountered a similar issue or can suggest a working solution.

Expected/Actual Behavior

Expected Behavior

CountryCode (Input)Processed CountryCodeOutput

"NO""NO"false
"SE""SE"true
"" (empty)"Empty"true
null"Empty"true
"US""US"true

This means:

  • The output should always be true unless CountryCode = "NO", in which case it should return false.
  • If CountryCode is null or "" (empty), it might be converted to "Empty" in order to be processed (not sure if this is the most effective approach) but still always return true.

Actual Behavior

  • When CountryCode is null, the mapping either returns null or does not process correctly.
  • The or() function sometimes receives null instead of true/false, causing failures.
  • Using ifWithoutElse() for CountryCode does not always ensure a valid output.
  • equals(CountryCode, "NO") returns null instead of false when CountryCode is missing.

Current Mapping Approach (Not Working)

I have tried the following Message Mapping functions:

  1. Ensure CountryCode is never null before checking "NO"

    • Using ifWithoutElse(Not(Exists(ns0:CountryCode)), "Empty")

  2. Check if CountryCode is "NO"

    • Using equals(ifWithoutElse(), "NO")

  3. Check if CountryCode is "Empty"

    • Using equals(ifWithoutElse(), "Empty")

  4. Use or() to check if CountryCode is "NO" or "Empty"

    • or(equals("NO"), equals("Empty"))

  5. Use Not(or()) to determine if Address should be created

    • Not(or()) → And() → CreateIf()

Issue

  • equals(ifWithoutElse(), "NO") sometimes returns null instead of false.
  • The or() function does not handle null values properly, causing an empty result.
  • Not(or()) is not always returning the expected true/false values.

Alternative Approaches Tried

1. Groovy Script Attempt (Did Not Work)

We attempted a Groovy script to handle null, "NO", and empty values, but encountered:

  • MissingPropertyException when CountryCode is null.
  • The script still produced null outputs instead of true/false.

2. Using fixContexts(), collapseContexts(), and removeContexts()

  • These functions did not ensure CountryCode was always valid before processing.

3. Using mapWithDefault() or copyValue()

  • These functions did not resolve null values correctly before checking "NO".

Questions

  1. How can I correctly ensure that CountryCode is always processed as a valid string (never null) before checking "NO"? (if this is necessary)
  2. Is there a better way to handle the logic in Message Mapping without requiring Groovy?

I have attached a picture of what i have. The input "CountryCode" as well as the "and" function that "CountryCode" has to be connected to with either the value "true" or "false" depending on the rules stated earlier in this post.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Code Value Mapping does not save in CPI Mapping Guidelines
entry.content:
Hi,

I just created a Mapping Guideline in CPI B2B Addon using INVOIC IDOC Type for both target and source MIG. The goal is having a simple one-to-one mapping. 

I wanted to leverage the proposal functionality and it actually worked as it should, the best proposal gave me the desired one-to-one mapping.

However when I am saving the MAG, all the code value mappings (for example for DIRECT and OUTMOD fields in EDI_DC40 node) disappear. I can again select the best proposal which gives me all the mappings back, but as soon as I save they are gone.

What am I doing wrong? I just need a simple one-to-one mapping. Do I have to replace the code values with functions? But why is it not working this way?

You have any hints for me?

 

Thank you

Andreas

entry.title: Successfactors - report Integration center API payload not sent to iflow CPI
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Could you help me on this very strange behavior of a successFactors API call ?

I created a report in successFractors to export JobInfo data to an API exposed in CPI.
I created a filter to send only one user's folder with the RUN NOW option.
In preview Data I see the user's data, in the Manager Execution log I exported the Page_1_dummy.json file which contains the data that should be sent in the body of the CPI API.
The problem in CPI, only the header of the Iflow contains data and there is no data in the payload, it is empty. No error in the execution of the Iflow CPI.
When I retrieve the data file from the Successfactors report and integrate it into a body in Postman. the data is sent to the Iflow in SCPI.
I execute my query in successfactors with an Admin user who has the necessary permissions. Have you already encountered this type of incident? Thank you for your feedback and advice. Best regards

entry.title: User Propagation from CPI to S/4 Backend
entry.content:
I have a third-party application connecting to our S/4 System using Cloud Connector and CPI. I created an iFlow that is working as a passthrough for SOAP calls to our backend. Currently they are sending the endpoint using a SAP ID credentials and then the receiver (S/4) is being sent using Basic Authentication of a SAP GUI user. The user logs into the 3PA using SAP GUI credentials, and we need that logon to be propagated to the backend system instead of using the static user we are currently. I am not sure how to do this as if I use Principal Propagation with the current set up, it is propagating the SAP ID account that is being sent with the sender request. We are currently using Neo. Any help is appreciated.

*Additional notes: there will be >100 users that will be using this that exist as SAP GUI users and do not have SAP IDs (S#).

entry.title: Facing below error Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing below error in Standard Replication iFlow in SAP CPI.

Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Generic_Object_Query failed with message "NullPointerException:while trying to invoke the method org.apache.catalina.TomcatPrincipal.getUserPrincipal() of a null object loaded from field org.apache.catalina.connector.Request.userPrincipal of an object loaded from local variable 'this'"

Please advice on the root cause and any steps need to be taken?

entry.title: Integration Advisor 1:1 mapping and
entry.content:
Hi experts,

is it possible to create a 1:1 mapping in Integration Advisor and change only one Field on the Target Side.
In SAP PO graphical mapping it was possible to click on a button an the mapping was created.

Or is it possible to use a custom XSLT.

 

I aggree that XSLT is more efficient and easier.
But is it possible ot use XSLT as MAG?
if yes how?

 

the xsl code works fine, but i want to add all other fields an sections 1:1 as easy as possible.

kind regards.

entry.title: Ariba import SupplierTaxRegistration via ITK
entry.content:
Hello,
I want to check anyone was able to successfully import SupplierTaxRegistration file in Ariba via ITK (import batch data) or is there any alternative way to import it via CPI.

entry.title: Resource 'pd:SAP_TPM_xxx:SOURCE_MSG_XSD:Binary' not found in Partner Directory
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on SAP B2B TPM - passThrough scenario development for X12-856 message type

While trying to execute interface I am getting below error - 

Resource 'pd:SAP_TPM_xxx6:SOURCE_MSG_XSD:Binary' not found in Partner Directory.

Any idea how to fix it?

Regards,

RJ

entry.title: PaymentInformation upsert in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central through CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I have to update the bank details coming in a csv file to PaymentInformation portlet in Successfactors Employee Central to an entity PaymentInformationDetailV3.

We are receiving all the details except external code from source system. The external code is a key field in the PaymentInformationDetailV3, So I am unable to update the information with the below error.

PaymentInformationDetailV3 Upsert Failed for empId: 00002. Error msg: bad valueString [] as part of keyString [PaymentInformationV3_effectiveStartDate=datetime'2025-01-03T00%3A00%3A00',PaymentInformationV3_worker='00002',externalCode=]"

I have checked the below KBA's as well.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3000179
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002990468

The external code is an autogenerated field in Employee central, When the SF EC consultant update the information manually through import templates the external code is auto generated.

Please let me know how this field external code is to be mapped in sap cpi .

Regards,

Ramya

entry.title: Process Integration Runtime Instance gives error - SAP CPI
entry.content:
When creating instances, the following error occurs.

Couldn't create an instance of service 'SAP Process Integration Runtime' with plan 'integration-flow'.

Please tell me how to solve it.

entry.title: Conent Enricher ODataV4 is causing an error - Unbound namespace URI
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are currently running into an error when we want to use the content enricher with ODATA V4. We have following payload as original message:

 

<rpt_transcript xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <transcript>
    <start_dt>2024-11-22T08:00:00Z</start_dt>
    <comp_dt xsi:nil="true"/>
    <object_id>819b6e0c-f252-49f2-dc45-a3cc7d4c8829</object_id>
    <t_user_id>0815</t_user_id>
  </transcript>
</rpt_transcript>

 

Here followed the config of the content enricher: 

ODATAV4 enricher config:

And here as an example the XML payload for the payload wich should be enriched (lookup message):

 

    <rpt_user xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
      <rpt_user>
        <user_name_first>XXX</user_name_first>
        <user_id>0815</user_id>
        <user_name_last>XXX</user_name_last>
        <user_address2 xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_address1 xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_zip xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_state xsi:nil="true"/>
      </rpt_user>
    </rpt_user>

 

At the moment we are getting following error in CPI:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Error occurred during aggregation. Exchange[498134F5CD2FC33-0000000000000003]. Caused by: [com.sap.it.rt.camel.aggregate.exception.AggregationStrategyException - java.lang.IllegalStateException: Exception at getRecordAtCurrentLevelAgainstKey], cause: javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamException: Unbound namespace URI 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance'

 

Fore sure the "xmlns:xsi=http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" is already configured in the namespace mapping in the runtime configuration.

Does someone have ideas? 

Thanks

DL

entry.title: OData V4 Error.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where I'm making OData V4 POST call to S4HANA with standard OData api_safetydatasheetassessment. Now there is an extension to this API i.e SAP__self.UpdateSafetyDataSheetDocumentDetails which I'm providing manually because not getting this in Select Entity & Define Operations (attaching SS).

 

When I'm deploying the interface, I'm getting below error.

If anyone has worked on Product Compliance interfaces, please help me on this.

Please suggest some solution for this.


P.S : Already tried converting JSON to XML.
Also tried with HTTP adapter.  

 

Thanks in advance!! 😊

 


SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries   SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   Cloud Integration   SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Digital manufacturing Product Master Data Transfer
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have set up an integration between a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition # system and aSAP Digital Manufacturing #system. All according to thisSAP Digital Manufacturing for execution Integration | SAP Help Portal guide. The integration scenarios seem to be working correctly and we have been able to send over multiple production orders and Master Data objects such as routings and work centers and . However with the transfer of products/materials we run into a problem.

To run the master data transfer scenario we used the app "Replicate by Object Selection" in the public cloud system. All the transfer that we have done were going great on the Public Cloud/outbound side. However on the DM/Inbound side we ran into problems. The first problem that we had was that the transfer was successful, on the "Integration Message Dashboard" app in DM, the transfer was logged as complete. However we could not find the product in our manage materials app. We read somewhere that this might be due to the plant having a different name in DM than in the PC system. So we made another Plant in DM and gave it the same name. After we had done that the "integration Message Board"(DM) no longer game the message Completed after we ran the  "Replicate by Object Selection" (PC) job. Instead it gave the

Error Detail: Error on creation of master data objects. The full responds Payload is at the end of this message.
Does anyone have a clue on how to solve this problem or where the error might come from>
 
With kind regards,
Robin van Buiten
 
 
Responds Payload:
{
"errorCode": "masterData.download.fail",
"message": "com.sap.dme.exception.ApiServiceException",
"messageI18nKey": "request.masterData.error",
"messageInEnglish": "Error on creation of master data objects",
"errorLocation": "INTERNAL_SYSTEM_ERROR",
"serviceName": "dme-product-ms",
"eventType": "sap.dsc.dm.Material.Received.v1"
}

entry.title: Compensation Statement integration with FileNet using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have a client requesting Compensation Statement integration with FileNet using SAP CPI. 

Do you know if this is possible? And if not, could you suggest a workaround.

Best Regards,
Pavan

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central  SAP Integration Suite 

 

 

 

 

#

entry.title: SAP Integration suite
entry.content:
Hi community, is there any way to connect SAP integration cloud tenant with the servers(web socket supported) through websocket communication ?

Regards,

Mohan Sai
